response.global_analysis: The audio features two distinct songs. For the first segment ('GIRLS' LEGEND U'), the reference JSON lyrics did not match the sung segment, so I ignored them and transcribed from the audio. For the second song ('STARTING OVER'), the audio phonetically matches the reference JSON. I discarded the 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' lyrics from the JSON that were not performed. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal activation, and segment breaks honor audio pauses.

subtitles.original: 夏も 秋も 冬も 越え 願え 焦がれ 走れ
subtitles.english: Crossing summer, autumn, and winter; wish, long, and run

subtitles.original: あぁ 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Ah, towards victory

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... my destiny
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... my destiny

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER

subtitles.original: やっと幕を下ろせた 最後の瞬間まで
subtitles.english: Finally, the curtain has fallen, until the very last moment

subtitles.original: わたしは精一杯に わたしをやりきった
subtitles.english: I did my best, I gave it my all

subtitles.original: 終演の続きは 誰も知らなくていい
subtitles.english: No one needs to know what follows the end of the show

subtitles.original: 涙を置いて 新しい旅に出よう
subtitles.english: Leave the tears behind and set out on a new journey

subtitles.original: 熱狂はあなたを選ぶ 違う結末だっただけ
subtitles.english: The fervor chooses you, it was just a different ending

subtitles.original: 同じ愛になれなかった Destiny
subtitles.english: A destiny where we couldn't become the same love

subtitles.original: これまでの全てを 差し出すような愛だった
subtitles.english: It was a love where I offered up everything until now

subtitles.original: 世界の意味が変わるくらいに 肯定された気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I felt affirmed, as if the meaning of the world had changed

subtitles.original: 何気なさの中で 気づけた最初の奇跡が
subtitles.english: The first miracle I noticed in the midst of the ordinary...

subtitles.original: あなたでよかった わたしでよかった 心から思えたよ
subtitles.english: ...was being glad it was you and glad it was me

subtitles.original: ずっと遠い未来も ちゃんと覚えていよう
subtitles.english: I'll make sure to remember even in the far-off future

subtitles.original: 自分の抱きしめ方 明日の願い方
subtitles.english: How to hold myself, how to wish for tomorrow

subtitles.original: あなたが いなくても わたしの片隅で
subtitles.english: Even if you're not here, in a corner of my heart...

subtitles.original: 優しい光 消えたりしないとわかる
subtitles.english: ...I know the gentle light will never fade

subtitles.original: 今はまだ手を振れるほど 道は別れたばかりで
subtitles.english: For now, I can still wave, as our paths have only just parted

subtitles.original: 後ろ髪に風を感じながら
subtitles.english: While feeling the wind in my hair as I look back

subtitles.original: それまでの全てが あなたに出会うためだった
subtitles.english: Everything until then was for the sake of meeting you

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないこと 本当の意味で知れたから
subtitles.english: Because I've learned the true meaning of how no moment was wasted

subtitles.original: 次の曲がり角も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next corner in my own way

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる 新しい一歩 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Believe and start walking a new step that leads to a 'sometime'

subtitles.original: 心から誰かを愛せた あの日々は
subtitles.english: Those days when I could love someone from my heart...

subtitles.original: 間違いなくわたしの Destiny
subtitles.english: ...were undoubtedly my destiny

subtitles.original: これまでの全てが 新しい力をくれる
subtitles.english: Everything until now gives me new strength

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないなら 何が起きても大丈夫だから
subtitles.english: If no moment is wasted, then no matter what happens, it'll be okay

subtitles.original: 次の物語も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next story in my own way

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる わたしのはじまり 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Believe and start walking towards my beginning that leads to a 'sometime'
